content: Hey, I'm a Data Scientist at BioGenesis Pharma and I've been feeling stuck in my job lately. I want to learn some new skills to advance my career.
What kind of skills are you thinking of learning? Are you looking to move into a specific area of data science?
I've been interested in learning more about machine learning and deep learning. I've also been getting into leatherworking in my free time, which is a nice break from screens.
Leatherworking is a unique hobby! How did you get into it?
I just started taking classes at a local workshop and I love it. I've made a few bags and wallets, and I'm planning to make a leather journal for my fiancée's birthday on February 12th.
That's so thoughtful! Making a leather journal will be a great gift. Are you planning a special celebration for her birthday?
Yeah, we're planning a weekend getaway to the mountains. We love mountain biking and hiking, so it'll be a great opportunity to get outdoors and have some fun.
That sounds like a great plan! Mountain biking and hiking are excellent ways to stay active and enjoy nature. Have you thought about where you'll be living after you get married?
We're actually thinking about moving to a new house in the suburbs, with a big backyard where we can have a garden and a workshop for my leatherworking.
That sounds like a great idea! Having a big backyard will give you plenty of space to pursue your hobbies. What's the plan for your wedding?
We're planning a small ceremony with close friends and family, and then a bigger reception with more guests. We're thinking about having it in May 2025.
That sounds like a great plan! Having a small ceremony and a bigger reception will allow you to celebrate with the people you care about. What's the plan for the food and drinks?
We're thinking about having a lot of board games and outdoor activities, like a giant Jenga game and a photo booth. We're also planning to have a signature cocktail for the wedding.
That sounds like a lot of fun! Having board games and outdoor activities will be a great way to keep your guests entertained. What's the plan for the music and entertainment?
We're thinking about having a live band play during the reception, and also having a DIY station where guests can make their own leather accessories.
That's a great idea! Having a DIY station will be a unique and fun activity for your guests. I'm sure they'll love it.
Thanks, I hope so! I just want to make everything perfect for my fiancée. I've also been baking sourdough bread for our friends and family, which has been a big hit.
Baking sourdough bread is a great hobby! It's always nice to share your creations with others. What's your favorite type of sourdough to bake?
